author: codex

patch.value: Fix sessions list output format and active playback fields

GitHub issue #23 reports that sessions list bypasses the global output-format contract and omits active playback data. Reproduce against command wiring and formatters, route results through the shared output formatter, preserve machine-readable formats, and expose useful NowPlayingItem/PlayState details without leaking sensitive fields.

JSON, YAML, TOON, table, and default output follow the shared output contract.; Active playback fields are present when supplied and absent safely when not supplied.; Focused regression tests cover both formatting and playback projection.
Run sessions list with --output json or another global format; observe human-specific rendering and missing playback details.
sessions list honors the requested global format and reports active playback fields consistently.
output format is ignored and active playback context is omitted.
Agents cannot reliably parse session state and operators cannot see current playback context.

message: Track GitHub issue 23 with reproduction and expected behavior

value.author: codex
value.text: Regression proof: focused session/global-option suite passes 15 tests; global and command-local JSON flags both parse,expose isPlaying,preserve NowPlayingItem,and include PlayState.IsPaused.

value.author: codex
value.text: Merged in PR #25; GitHub issue #23 auto-closed at merge. Focused regression tests and the 888-test release suite pass on daa3eee.

patch.value: Routed session list and get through shared format handling; JSON preserves raw server data plus isPlaying while Toon and human output expose active playback context.

author: codex

patch.value: Focused 15-test session and global-option suite plus full 888-test suite pass; GitHub issue #23 is closed by PR #25.
All supported formats honor global or command-local selection and expose safe playback fields.
Implemented shared format routing and active playback projections for sessions list and get.
Issue #23 is fixed, regression-tested, merged, and closed.

message: Close after issue and merged-head verification
